Explanation: I agree with the other agents. Evidence from [58617] confirms that Sadiq Malkani was the geologist who explored the site where dinosaur footprints were discovered before 2010 and found dinosaur bones in 2000, which were later confirmed by Jeffery Wilson and Phillip Gingerich. [37553] further verifies that Muhammad Sadiq Malkani authored a study in December 2011 on the rocks, minerals, history, and ancient life of Balochistan, matching all the criteria in the question. Thus, the first name of the explorer is "Sadiq."
Exact Answer: Sadiq
Confidence: 100%
